_description: NEXUS-14 V3.2 - Article Classification & Editorial/Monetization Strategy for MoneyAbroadGuide.com (helpful-content-first, AdSense-safe). PROPOSAL via PR - human review required before merge.
_blueprint_issue: See Issue #4 for full editorial & monetization blueprint and rationale.
_reconciliation_note: Reconciles word-count tiers to nexus14_v2_config.yaml v3.1.0 (cost-optimized, max 5000 words). Prior v3.0.0 PILLAR 7000-12000 ceilings were stale and conflicted with the YAML.

editorial_philosophy.principle: Helpful content first; monetization layered on top of genuine usefulness, never in place of it.
editorial_philosophy.google_policy_alignment: Designed to avoid scaled-content-abuse and site-reputation-abuse risk; supports EEAT and AdSense approval.

topic_prioritization_scoring._description: Balanced topic-selection scoring. Weights sum to 100. Replaces revenue-only model in agent_18.
topic_prioritization_scoring.selection_rule: Prioritize topics scoring high on BOTH user value AND monetization. High-revenue but low-user-value topics are downgraded; high-value low-monetization topics may still publish to support clusters/authority.

PILLAR.description: Comprehensive cornerstone content targeting competitive keywords (cost-optimized v3.1 tier).

STANDARD.description: High-quality targeted articles for medium-competition keywords (default tier).

OPPORTUNITY.description: Lower-difficulty topics with moderate revenue score (60-70) but solid user value.

pseudo_code: score = balanced_score(user_value, commercial_intent, search_demand, affiliate, authority)
IF keyword_difficulty > 50 OR strategic_topic OR search_volume > 5000 OR revenue_score > 85: PILLAR

monetization_requirements.note: Scenarios must be clearly labeled as illustrative examples.

duplicate_prevention._description: Enforced by Agent 17 (Cannibalization) BEFORE Agent 04 generation.

category_safeguards._description: Country-category integrity. Validation runs BEFORE publication and BLOCKS on mismatch.

strategic_topics: Best bank accounts for immigrants USA
How to build credit in USA as immigrant
How to file taxes as international student USA
Best credit cards for newcomers Canada
How to send money internationally from USA
Tax filing for newcomers Canada CRA
How to get SSN as international student
Banking without credit history USA immigrants

tier_0_top_priority: Car Insurance for New Immigrants in the USA
Car Insurance for Newcomers in Canada
Best Credit Cards for ITIN Holders
Best Bank Bonuses for Newcomers to the USA
tier_1_high: Cheapest Way to Send Money from USA to Canada

quality_first_policy.rule: Quality always wins over volume. Quality gates remain blocking and must never be relaxed to hit article counts.
quality_first_policy.ninety_day_target_articles: 60-75 (under the 6/day cap, only if all gates pass)
